packageName: IKEA Air Quality to Hub Variables
author: RamSet
releaseNotes: Publishes IKEA Vindstyrka (E2112) air quality sensor values (PM2.5, air quality text, temperature, humidity) into Hub Variables for use in Rule Machine, dashboards, and notifications. Supports an indoor and an outdoor sensor, only writes on actual change, and shows live readings on the app page. Hub Variables must already exist (Settings > Hub Variables); missing ones are logged and skipped rather than created.
tags: Air Quality, IKEA, Vindstyrka, PM2.5, Hub Variables, Sensor

apps.name: IKEA Air Quality to Hub Variables
apps.description: Reads two IKEA Vindstyrka sensors and publishes PM2.5, air quality, temperature, and humidity into Hub Variables.
